description: Machine-readable specification for onboarding an application to the CloudWarriors autopilot pipeline. All required files, fields, and infrastructure must be present and correctly configured before autopilot can operate reliably.
canonicalReference: cloudwarriors-ai/project-pulse (Path A — direct execution) and cloudwarriors-ai/scopely (Path B — shadow-first execution with Sentinel validation)

path_a_direct.description: Autopilot runs directly on the source repo. SHADOW_ENABLED=false (or unset). Fix branch created from dev, preview deployed, Sentinel validates, PR opened targeting dev.

path_b_shadow_first.description: Autopilot runs on the shadow repo first. SHADOW_ENABLED=true on source repo blocks direct execution and routes via shadow. After shadow fix merges, shadow CI promotes an upstream PR to the source repo.

layer_1_app_config.title: App Config (.autopilot/)
layer_1_app_config.description: Per-app configuration directory consumed by the reusable-autopilot-runner and Sentinel validator. Must exist at repo root.

requiredFiles.description: Primary runtime config consumed by reusable-autopilot-runner.yml to drive CI behaviour, build/test commands, and preview deploy settings.

name.description: Repo slug, no spaces. Must match the GitHub repo name exactly.

runtime.description: Primary application runtime. Drives which install/build paths the runner uses.

packageManager.description: Package manager. Required for python runtime (pip or uv). Optional for node (defaults to npm).

buildCommand.description: Command to produce a production build artifact. Runner runs this to verify the fix compiles.

lintCommand.description: Lint/typecheck command. Runner runs this after applying a fix. Exit code 0 = pass.

testCommand.description: Unit/integration test command. Scoped to fast tests — not E2E. Runner executes this against the fix branch.

appTestCommand.description: App-level smoke/E2E test command run against the preview container. May include playwright or pytest sentinel tests. Must exit 0 on success.

dbMigrateCommand.description: Database migration command run inside the preview container on startup. Must be safe to run repeatedly (idempotent).

testPatterns.description: File glob patterns identifying test files. Used by runner to scope changes. Empty array is valid — runner uses assertionPatterns as fallback.

assertionPatterns.description: Strings that indicate assertion lines in test files. Used to validate that test files contain real assertions.

healthEndpoint.description: HTTP path checked by Sentinel and runner to confirm the preview container is alive. Must return HTTP 200 when healthy.

containerName.description: Name of the primary application service in docker-compose.preview.yml. Used by runner to exec into the container.

dbContainer.description: Name of the database service in docker-compose.preview.yml, if separate exec is needed. Empty string if not used.

previewDeploy.description: Whether to spin up a preview container for this fix. Must be true for Sentinel validation to work.

autoMerge.description: Whether autopilot auto-merges the fix PR after all checks pass. False = human review required.

requireE2EPass.description: Gate merge on appTestCommand passing. Defaults to true when previewDeploy=true.

requirePreviewDeploy.description: Gate merge on preview container successfully starting. Defaults to true when previewDeploy=true.

state.description: Whether Sentinel API-driven validation is active for this app.

reason.description: Human note explaining why validation is in its current state.
reason.example: Phase 4 onboarding — second app on the Sentinel API-driven validation harness

requiredFiles.description: Sentinel API-driven validation configuration. Defines how Sentinel connects to the preview container, which endpoints to test, golden fixture paths, and verdict policy.

name.description: Must match config.json name field exactly.

schemaVersion.description: Sentinel schema version. Always '1' for current harness.

baseUrlTemplate.description: URL template for preview containers. {issue} is substituted with the issue number. Must match Traefik router rule in docker-compose.preview.yml.

healthEndpoint.description: Health check path. Must match config.json healthEndpoint. Must return HTTP 200.

style.description: How Sentinel authenticates to the preview container. Use 'none' for unauthenticated public endpoints.

loginEndpoint.description: Login endpoint path. Required when style != 'none'.

credentialEnv.description: Maps credential fields to GitHub Actions secret names. Required when style != 'none'.

tokenPath.description: JSON path in the login response where the token lives.

header.description: HTTP header name for the auth token.

headerFormat.description: Header value format. {token} is substituted with the resolved token.

dir.description: Directory containing YAML scenario files, relative to repo root.

include.description: Glob patterns for scenario files to include.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for scenario files to exclude.

dir.description: Directory where Sentinel writes and reads golden response fixtures.

endpointAllowlist.description: Exhaustive list of METHOD /path patterns Sentinel is allowed to call. Sentinel rejects any scenario step not on this list. Required for all apps — empty array blocks all validation.

volatility.description: Rules for ignoring non-deterministic fields when comparing golden vs actual response.

ignorePathsByPattern.description: Regex patterns matching JSON path strings that Sentinel ignores in diff. Cover timestamps, request IDs, and other volatile fields.

idFields.description: Field names treated as stable IDs (not ignored, but diff-normalized).

timestampRegex.description: Regex matching timestamp strings for automatic volatility suppression.

writeAudit.description: Write-safety guardrails. Sentinel only performs writes (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) in listed environments.

environmentsAllowingWrites.description: Only these environment names allow non-GET requests. Preview containers use 'dev'.

tagHeader.description: HTTP header Sentinel adds to all write requests for auditability.

maxRequestsPerRun.description: Hard cap on total requests per Sentinel run. Prevents runaway API hammering.

maxRps.description: Requests per second rate limit applied by Sentinel.

regressionBlocks.description: Whether a Sentinel regression (golden mismatch) blocks the PR merge.

newBehaviorRequiresApproval.description: Whether new (no existing golden) responses require a human to approve before becoming the new golden.

overrideLabel.description: GitHub issue label that bypasses Sentinel verdict blocks. Must also exist in issue labels config.

requiredFiles.description: RLM (Reasoning Language Model) engine context injected into every Claude run for this application. Must include: tech stack summary, git flow (which branch autopilot targets), port, key file paths, API response contract, auth/roles, database conventions, E2E critical rules, and code style.
requiredFiles.notes: This file is the single source of truth the RLM uses when generating fixes. Stale or missing content leads to broken PRs. Update whenever conventions change.

optionalFiles.description: Shell script that seeds the preview database with fixture data after migrations run. Required only for apps that need pre-populated state to pass E2E tests. Must be idempotent and exit 0.
optionalFiles.requiredWhen: App E2E tests depend on seed data that doesn't exist in schema defaults

layer_2_source_workflows.title: Source Repo Workflows (.github/workflows/)
layer_2_source_workflows.description: GitHub Actions workflows in the source (non-shadow) repo that drive the autopilot pipeline. Two are required; one is required for shadow-enabled apps.

requiredFiles.description: Intake workflow: validates the issue, resolves track (bug/feature) and base branch, dispatches autopilot-runner, updates issue labels. Must implement shadow guard.

requiredSteps.name: Check shadow guard
requiredSteps.description: Reads SHADOW_ENABLED repo variable. Sets output 'blocked' to 'true'/'false'. All downstream steps must gate on this output.

requiredSteps.name: Exit if shadow-enabled
requiredSteps.description: Posts a dedup-guarded comment (marker: <!-- AUTOPILOT_SHADOW_GUARD -->) and fails the job. Prevents execution on source repo when shadow routing is active.

requiredSteps.name: Check kill switch
requiredSteps.description: Three checks: (1) global kill via AUTOPILOT: Disabled label on any open issue, (2) per-issue skip via AUTOPILOT: Skip label, (3) rate limit of max 5 concurrent autopilot runs.

requiredSteps.name: Exit if disabled
requiredSteps.description: Posts dedup-guarded comment (marker: <!-- AUTOPILOT_DISABLED -->) with kill reason and fails the job.

requiredSteps.name: Resolve issue context
requiredSteps.description: Resolves track (bugs/features) from TRACK: Bug/Feature labels or title prefix. Resolves base branch from ENV: Dev/Prod labels (default: dev). Sets head branch as autofix/issue-{number}. Fails if track unresolvable.

requiredSteps.name: Dispatch runner
requiredSteps.description: Calls github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch targeting autopilot-runner.yml on the resolved base branch.

requiredSteps.name: Set STATUS label
requiredSteps.description: Removes all STATUS:* labels and adds STATUS: In Progress.

requiredSteps.name: Post progress comment
requiredSteps.description: Upserts a progress comment (marker: <!-- AUTOPILOT_V2 -->) with track, base, head, and workflow run link.

requiredFiles.criticalNote: Every step after shadow_guard MUST include the shadow guard condition: steps.shadow_guard.outputs.blocked != 'true'. Missing this causes autopilot to run on the source repo even when shadow routing is active.

requiredFiles.description: Runner workflow: thin caller that passes inputs to the shared reusable-autopilot-runner.yml. SHA-pinned to ensure reproducibility across deployments.
Code sync workflow: pushes code changes from main/dev to the shadow repo. Without this, shadow runs against stale code. REQUIRED when path_b_shadow_first is used.

layer_3_shadow_repo.title: Shadow Repo
layer_3_shadow_repo.description: A separate GitHub repo (cloudwarriors-ai/{name}-shadow) where autopilot runs first when Path B is active. Code is kept in sync via layer_2_source_workflows/shadow-code-sync.yml.

requiredFiles.description: Shadow repo intake + autopilot dispatcher. Uses the centralized reusable-autopilot-intake.yml from cloudwarriors-ai/.github. Handles: (1) hourly cron issue sync, (2) AUTOFIX: Ready label trigger, (3) code sync reception, (4) upstream PR promotion after shadow fix merges.

sourceIssueCommentLifecycle.description: When Path B is active, the platform automatically cross-posts status updates to the source issue. No onboarder action required — this is handled by the reusable-autopilot-intake and reusable-autopilot-runner platform workflows.

comments.when: AUTOFIX: Ready label applied to source issue and SHADOW_ENABLED=true
comments.content: One-time notice. Includes link to shadow repo issues page (derived as cloudwarriors-ai/shadow-{owner}-{repo}). Posted once; not updated.

comments.postedBy: reusable-autopilot-intake.yml (cross-post step, runs in shadow repo context)
comments.content: Created with shadow issue link + workflow run link + 'In Progress' status. Updated by reusable-autopilot-runner.yml finalize job with shadow PR link ('Fix Ready') or follow-up notice ('Follow-Up Required').

comments.when: Shadow fix PR merges and upstream PR is created on source repo
comments.content: Final state comment with shadow issue link, shadow PR link, and upstream source PR link.

layer_3_shadow_repo.notes: Shadow repo .autopilot/ config is NOT manually maintained — it is overwritten by shadow-code-sync on every push to main/dev in the source repo. Never manually edit shadow repo app config files.

layer_4_preview_deploy.title: Preview Deploy
layer_4_preview_deploy.description: Docker Compose setup that runs the application in a preview container for each autopilot fix. Sentinel targets the preview container URL for API-driven validation.

requiredFiles.description: Defines the preview container stack. Required services: app (the application) and a database if the app needs one. Must expose the app via Traefik with the correct domain pattern.

requiredEnvVars.name: PREVIEW_ID
requiredEnvVars.description: Issue number (e.g. 'issue-42'). Set by the runner at deploy time.

requiredEnvVars.name: PREVIEW_AUTH_SECRET
requiredEnvVars.description: Auth secret passed to the app container (AUTH_SECRET / NEXTAUTH_SECRET equivalent).

requiredTraefikLabels.description: App service must have Traefik labels exposing both the frontend domain and the API alias domain.
requiredTraefikLabels.note: The api alias host pattern must match validation.json baseUrlTemplate with {issue} substituted.

forbiddenConfig.reason: Prevents database migrations from running in the preview container. Must be absent or set to false. The runner expects migrations to run automatically on container start via the entrypoint script.

requiredFiles.description: Container entrypoint script. Must run the dbMigrateCommand (from config.json) before starting the application. Presence of SKIP_MIGRATIONS env var in docker-compose.preview.yml must not block this.
requiredFiles.requiredBehavior: Run migrations → start app. Must be idempotent.

requiredDirectories.description: Directory for Sentinel YAML scenario files. Must exist. May be empty initially — Sentinel discovers files here.
Directory where Sentinel writes and reads golden response fixtures. Must exist in git (use .gitkeep if empty). Without this, Sentinel cannot write goldens on first run.

layer_5_secrets_and_labels.title: Secrets, Variables & Labels
layer_5_secrets_and_labels.description: GitHub Actions secrets, repository variables, and issue labels required for the autopilot pipeline to function.

requiredSecrets.name: WORKFLOW_PAT
requiredSecrets.description: GitHub Personal Access Token with workflow scope. Used by autopilot-intake.yml to dispatch autopilot-runner.yml. Without this, dispatch fails with 403.

requiredSecrets.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
requiredSecrets.description: OpenRouter API key. Powers both RLM codebase analysis and the Claude autofix step (Claude CLI is routed through OpenRouter via ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL). Required for autofix to run.

requiredSecrets.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
requiredSecrets.description: Deprecated. Autofix now bills through OpenRouter; this key is optional and retained only to roll back to direct Anthropic billing.

requiredSecrets.name: PREVIEW_AUTH_SECRET
requiredSecrets.description: Secret used as AUTH_SECRET / NEXTAUTH_SECRET (or equivalent) in the preview container. Must be a non-empty string — any random value is acceptable for preview.

requiredSecrets.name: SHADOW_PAT
requiredSecrets.description: GitHub PAT with repo scope to push code to the shadow repo. Required only when path_b_shadow_first is used.

requiredVariables.name: SHADOW_ENABLED
requiredVariables.description: Repo variable (not secret) that toggles shadow routing. When 'true', autopilot-intake.yml blocks direct execution and routes to shadow repo. When 'false' or unset, Path A (direct) runs.
requiredVariables.location: GitHub → Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → Variables

requiredLabels.name: AUTOFIX: Ready
requiredLabels.description: Triggers autopilot-intake.yml when applied to an issue. Primary trigger label.

requiredLabels.name: TRACK: Bug
requiredLabels.description: Routes the issue to the 'bugs' track in autopilot. Sets track=bugs in runner dispatch.

requiredLabels.name: TRACK: Feature
requiredLabels.description: Routes the issue to the 'features' track in autopilot. Sets track=features in runner dispatch.

requiredLabels.name: STATUS: In Progress
requiredLabels.description: Applied by autopilot-intake when runner is dispatched. Replaced by STATUS: Done or STATUS: Failed by the runner on completion.

requiredLabels.name: STATUS: Done
requiredLabels.description: Applied by runner when fix PR is successfully created and all checks pass.

requiredLabels.name: STATUS: Failed
requiredLabels.description: Applied by runner when it cannot produce a passing fix.

requiredLabels.name: AUTOPILOT: Disabled
requiredLabels.description: Global kill switch. When any open issue has this label, autopilot-intake blocks ALL new runs.

requiredLabels.name: AUTOPILOT: Skip
requiredLabels.description: Per-issue kill switch. When the target issue has this label, autopilot-intake skips it.

requiredLabels.name: ENV: Dev
requiredLabels.description: Signals that the fix should target the dev branch. Default when neither ENV label is present.

requiredLabels.name: ENV: Prod
requiredLabels.description: Signals that the fix should target the main branch. Use for hotfixes only.

requiredLabels.name: validation-override
requiredLabels.description: Bypasses Sentinel verdict blocks (regression or new-behavior approval gate). Must match validation.json verdictPolicy.overrideLabel exactly.

onboardingChecklist.description: Ordered checklist for onboarding a new app. Complete all items before triggering autopilot for the first time.

items.task: Create .autopilot/config.json with all required fields
Create .autopilot/validation.json with correct baseUrlTemplate matching Traefik router rule
Create .autopilot/claude-prompt.md covering all required sections
Create validation/scenarios/ directory (empty is OK)
Create validation/fixtures/golden/.gitkeep
Create or update .github/workflows/autopilot-intake.yml with shadow guard block on all steps
Create or update .github/workflows/autopilot-runner.yml SHA-pinned to current reusable runner SHA
Create .github/workflows/shadow-code-sync.yml (required for Path B only)
Verify docker-compose.preview.yml has no SKIP_MIGRATIONS env var
Verify Traefik api-alias router rule matches validation.json baseUrlTemplate pattern
Verify docker-entrypoint.sh runs migrations before app start
Add WORKFLOW_PAT to GitHub repo secrets
Add OPENROUTER_API_KEY to GitHub repo secrets (required; powers RLM analysis and Claude autofix)
Add PREVIEW_AUTH_SECRET to GitHub repo secrets
Create SHADOW_ENABLED repo variable (set to 'false' for Path A, 'true' for Path B)
Create all required issue labels in GitHub repo
Create shadow repo: cloudwarriors-ai/{name}-shadow
Add claude-ci.yml using reusable-autopilot-intake.yml to shadow repo
Add SHADOW_PAT to source repo secrets
Push to source repo main/dev to trigger first code sync
Set SHADOW_ENABLED=true on source repo
Create a test issue with TRACK: Bug and AUTOFIX: Ready labels
Verify autopilot-intake runs without error (check Actions tab)
Verify autopilot-runner dispatches and preview container starts
Verify Sentinel can reach baseUrlTemplate (health check passes)
Verify golden fixtures are written to validation/fixtures/golden/ on first run

complianceCheckerHints.description: Machine-readable hints for automated compliance checking tools. Checks prefixed 'check_platform_' target cloudwarriors-ai/.github reusable workflows and are verified against that repo, not onboarded app repos.

checks.description: autopilot-intake.yml (source repo) contains shadow guard step, exit-if-shadow step, and all downstream steps gate on shadow_guard.outputs.blocked. The guard comment now includes a dynamic link to the shadow repo issues page.
checks.note: The guard comment body is dynamic (includes derived shadow repo URL). Check for the marker string and 'shadow repo' text rather than the full message.

checks.description: autopilot-runner.yml uses SHA-pinned reference to reusable-autopilot-runner.yml
docker-compose.preview.yml has api-alias Traefik router matching preview-{PREVIEW_ID}.api.pscx.ai pattern
Platform check (cloudwarriors-ai/.github): reusable-autopilot-intake.yml contains cross-post step that writes <!-- SHADOW_RUN_ACTIVE --> to source issue when running in shadow repo.
requiredStrings: Cross-post shadow run to source issue

checks.description: Platform check (cloudwarriors-ai/.github): reusable-autopilot-runner.yml finalize job contains cross-post step that updates <!-- SHADOW_RUN_ACTIVE --> with shadow PR link or follow-up status.
requiredStrings: Cross-post shadow status to source issue
